title: OHP ASSISTER - 211info
text: SALUD CONNECT OHP ASSISTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers OHP services and education, including new enrollments, renewals, scheduling dental, primary care, and mental health appointments, answering billing questions, and updating client information. Provides assistance with applying for Health-Related Social Needs (HRSN) benefits such as housing, climate support, and nutrition. Also connects clients with additional community resources. Website Yamhill, OR 97148 Eligibility: Unrestricted, with a focus on the Latinx community Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5:30pm Email (971) 301-3207 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 301-3207 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion and Yamhill Counties Services: Medicaid Information/Counseling Medicaid Information/Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Navigator Programs Navigator Programs * Hispanic/Latino Community If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALUD CONNECT
